reviews.review_description:
Crêpe Master! is one of the most original VR games I’ve played in a long time. The mix of magical girl anime energy, fast-paced combat, gesture-based powers and frantic crêpe cooking somehow works perfectly together.

The VR interactions feel great, the humor is constant, and the whole experience is packed with personality. Performing magical poses to cast spells while smashing enemies with a sacred frying pan is just pure fun.

The colorful visuals, energetic gameplay and completely over-the-top concept make this a truly memorable VR experience. It’s creative, charming, funny and incredibly refreshing compared to many traditional VR games.

A fantastic indie VR surprise full of passion and originality. Definitely worth checking out!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for all your kind words! 🫶🥞

reviews.review_title: Finally a cutesy game for Quest! 💖
reviews.review_description:
Loved the game! The vibe is super cute and cozy, and we finally have a girly game with good mechanics where I can experience being a MAGICAL GIRL!! 😭💖  

After seeing so many games on this platform being either multiplayer sandbox, shooters or violence-focused, playing this is a nice breath of fresh air, and it existing at all makes me super happy! Thanks so much, devs! 🥰

developer_response.body: Thank you 🥹💖 we are very happy you found us too! Enjoy! 🫶

reviews.review_description: A beautiful, playful take on the Magical Girl genre ✨
Fun game with a lot of crepe and fight
